sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try rotating the top track red controller 3 more times and check each
for i in range(3):
    action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 18, 'col': 20}])
    ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    print(f"After rotation {i+1}:")
    print(f"  Top horizontal: {ascii_lines[17][14:56]}")
    print(f"  Middle horizontal: {ascii_lines[26][14:56]}")
    print(f"  Bottom horizontal: {ascii_lines[35][14:56]}")
    print(f"  Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
    if last_action_result.get('level_completed', False):
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
